title: Charity Donation Receipt
input:
HARVEST CANADA FOUNDATION
501(c)(3) Tax ID: 84-3920175

DONATION RECEIPT

Receipt #: DON-2026-03142
Date: March 14, 2026
Donor: Jennifer & Thomas O'Brien
Address: 782 Willow Creek Dr, Toronto, ON M4P 2J8

Donation Breakdown:

1. Disaster Relief Fund — $250.00
   One-time, designated donation

2. Annual Operating Fund — $500.00
   Recurring monthly ($41.67/mo)

3. Youth Scholarship Fund — $150.00
   One-time, in memory of Robert O'Brien

4. Matching Gift (employer match)
   TechForward Inc. match: $500.00
   Match ref: TF-2026-8847

Payment Method: Credit Card (Visa ****5532)

Total Received: $1,400.00

Acknowledgement: This receipt acknowledges receipt of a total
of $900.00 in cash contributions. The matching gift of $500.00
from TechForward Inc. is provided separately.

For tax purposes, $350.00 of your donation was for goods and
services (annual gala dinner tickets). The remaining $550.00
is fully tax-deductible.

Contact: donations@harvestcanada.org | (416) 555-8920
